page: Microsoft Azure DC2ads_v5 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the DCADSv5 server family. Powered by an AMD processor and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 2 dedicated virtual CPUs (vCPUs) and 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

The instance comes equipped with 77 GB of local storage and is designed to support Premium Storage options. It does not include integrated graphics processing units (GPUs) or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the DC2ads_v5 offers an entry-level dedicated resource profile suitable for workloads requiring a balanced allocation of compute and memory without the overhead of larger instances. Appropriate workloads for this configuration include lightweight web serving, small databases, development environments, and basic general-purpose computing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure DC2ads_v5 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the DCADSv5 family, utilizing the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor and an AMD processor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM (4.0 GB per core), and 77 GB of local storage, with support for Premium Storage. This instance does not include a GPU or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for balanced resource distribution, the DC2ads_v5 provides a qualitative entry-level option for workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources. It is suited for general-purpose tasks, lightweight web serving, small database hosting, and development environments.
